laws.title: Two-Factor Authentication
laws.description: Enhance account security by offering multiple forms of two-factor authentication methods.
laws.remediation: Integrate additional options like biometric authentication.

laws.title: Secure Password Recovery
laws.description: Strengthen password recovery processes to prevent unauthorized access.
laws.remediation: Incorporate additional verification steps when recovering passwords.

laws.title: Session Management
laws.description: Implement robust session management to prevent session hijacking.
laws.remediation: Set short session expiration times and use secure cookies.

laws.title: Content Security Policy
laws.description: Prevent cross-site scripting attacks by enforcing stricter content security policies.
laws.remediation: Establish a strong CSP by explicitly specifying trusted content sources.

laws.title: Data Encryption</title>
laws.description: Encrypt sensitive user data both at rest and in transit to protect privacy.
laws.remediation: Use TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest encryption.
